title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
